name: The Prerequisite
effect: Block all forward progress until the fix is merged. This card is considered non-negotiable.

clauses.name: PREREQUISITE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a new feature is proposed: It is placed in a holding state until this card is resolved.

clauses.name: ESCALATION EFFECT
clauses.rule: If this card is ignored: The lead developer sends a second message, worded differently but meaning the same thing.

clauses.name: TECHNICAL DEBT OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the fix is skipped anyway: The next feature inherits the defect and this card returns to play unannounced.

witness_quote: We can't build on top of broken.

translation_layer.observation: One person is blocking the queue.
translation_layer.skeptical_question: Was this in the sprint plan?
